title: Child Support Agreement (Private)
description: Private settlement between parents specifying monthly child support amounts and health expense allocations.
whatsCovered: Monthly base child support cash details
Direct payment of school tuition and childcare costs
Periodic payment review cycles based on income changes
whenToUse: Use this private agreement to document child support payments without going through court systems (subject to court approval).

clauses.heading: CHILD SUPPORT AGREEMENT (PRIVATE)
clauses.body: This agreement or policy (the "Agreement") is executed as of {effective_date} (the "Effective Date"), by and between {party_a_name}, residing/located at {party_a_address} ("First Party"), and {party_b_name}, residing/located at {party_b_address} ("Second Party").

clauses.heading: 1. Core Framework
clauses.body: This agreement establishes the legal rights, bylaws, transfers, waivers, or consent structures for the Child Support Agreement (Private). The parties agree to adhere to the terms and declarations set out below.

clauses.heading: 2. Monthly Support Payments
clauses.body: First Party shall pay monthly child support of {monthly_support_cash} for children: {children_names}. Health insurance splits shall be split equally.

clauses.heading: General Legal Terms
clauses.body: This document constitutes the entire understanding between the parties. Any amendments must be made in writing and executed by both parties.

clauses.heading: Governing Law
clauses.body: This Agreement shall be governed and interpreted under the laws of the State/Country of {governing_state}.

faq.question: Can I customize this legal template?
faq.answer: Yes, you can edit this template using the online editor, and add custom schedules or exhibits.

faq.question: Is this agreement binding?
faq.answer: Yes, once signed by all parties, it becomes a legally binding contract under state laws.
